docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $91.25) SERVED JUN-17-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT HOROWITZ, MONA
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: DEFENDANT'S REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL AND CHECK MAILED ON A0/05/19. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED - UNABLE TO FORWARD."

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-13-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-13-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF ALLAN SCHWARTZ IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MONA HOROWITZ IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
ADDED TO EXHIBIT DESTRUCTION REPORT OF JAN-02-2020

DEFENDANT MONA HOROWITZ IS NOT PRESENT. NO FURTHER SERVICE IS REQUIRED AT THIS TIME. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT HOROWITZ, MONA
